creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 219453
dog-0.1.0.diff

Command-line DNS client, like dig.
It has colourful output, understands
normal command-line argument syntax,
supports the DNS-over-TLS and
DNS-over-HTTPS protocols, and can
emit JSON.

WWW: https://dns.lookup.dog

QA:

 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 12.2-RELEASE, amd64).
